name: swap-events-hub
description: Swap Events Hub — MERN event booking platform

scripts.install:all: npm install && npm install --prefix server && npm install --prefix client
scripts.dev: concurrently -n server,client -c blue,green "npm run dev --prefix server" "npm run dev --prefix client"
scripts.start: concurrently -n server,client -c blue,green "npm run start --prefix server" "npm run preview --prefix client"
